approvals_completed_state_ck.name: approvals_completed_state_ck

cash_movements_reference_guard_uq.name: cash_movements_reference_guard_uq
cash_movements_reference_guard_uq.where: "cash_movements"."reference_type" is not null and "cash_movements"."reference_id" is not null

cash_movements_system_reference_ck.name: cash_movements_system_reference_ck
cash_movements_system_reference_ck.value:
"cash_movements"."type" not in ('opening_balance', 'cash_sale', 'cash_refund')
        or ("cash_movements"."reference_type" is not null and "cash_movements"."reference_id" is not null)

hardware_jobs_v2_required_fields_ck.name: hardware_jobs_v2_required_fields_ck
hardware_jobs_v2_required_fields_ck.value: "hardware_jobs"."protocol_version" <> 2 or ("hardware_jobs"."required_capability" is not null and "hardware_jobs"."payload_hash" is not null and "hardware_jobs"."expires_at" is not null and "hardware_jobs"."idempotency_key" is not null)

inventory_movements_reference_guard_uq.name: inventory_movements_reference_guard_uq
inventory_movements_reference_guard_uq.where: "inventory_movements"."reference_type" is not null and "inventory_movements"."reference_id" is not null

manual_payment_profiles_fields_ck.name: manual_payment_profiles_fields_ck
manual_payment_profiles_fields_ck.value:
(
        ("manual_payment_profiles"."profile_type" = 'qris'
          and "manual_payment_profiles"."verification_source" in ('merchant_app', 'bank_app')
          and "manual_payment_profiles"."merchant_id" is not null
          and btrim("manual_payment_profiles"."merchant_id") <> '')
        or
        ("manual_payment_profiles"."profile_type" = 'edc'
          and "manual_payment_profiles"."verification_source" = 'edc_terminal'
          and "manual_payment_profiles"."terminal_id" is not null
          and btrim("manual_payment_profiles"."terminal_id") <> '')
        or
        ("manual_payment_profiles"."profile_type" = 'bank_account'
          and "manual_payment_profiles"."verification_source" in ('bank_app', 'bank_statement')
          and "manual_payment_profiles"."destination_account" is not null
          and btrim("manual_payment_profiles"."destination_account") <> '')
      )

notification_events_active_dedupe_uq.name: notification_events_active_dedupe_uq
notification_events_active_dedupe_uq.where: "notification_events"."deduplication_key" is not null and "notification_events"."resolved_at" is null

payment_evidence_uploads_attachment_ck.name: payment_evidence_uploads_attachment_ck
payment_evidence_uploads_attachment_ck.value: ("payment_evidence_uploads"."sale_id" is null and "payment_evidence_uploads"."attached_at" is null) or ("payment_evidence_uploads"."sale_id" is not null and "payment_evidence_uploads"."attached_at" is not null and "payment_evidence_uploads"."expires_at" is null)

payment_reconciliations_amounts_nonnegat.name: payment_reconciliations_amounts_nonnegative_ck
payment_reconciliations_amounts_nonnegat.value: "payment_reconciliations"."fee_amount" >= 0 and "payment_reconciliations"."tax_amount" >= 0 and ("payment_reconciliations"."settlement_gross_amount" is null or "payment_reconciliations"."settlement_gross_amount" >= 0) and ("payment_reconciliations"."net_settlement_amount" is null or "payment_reconciliations"."net_settlement_amount" >= 0)

payment_reconciliations_net_formula_ck.name: payment_reconciliations_net_formula_ck
payment_reconciliations_net_formula_ck.value: "payment_reconciliations"."settlement_gross_amount" is null or "payment_reconciliations"."net_settlement_amount" is null or "payment_reconciliations"."net_settlement_amount" = "payment_reconciliations"."settlement_gross_amount" - "payment_reconciliations"."fee_amount" - "payment_reconciliations"."tax_amount"

payment_reconciliations_reconciled_compl.name: payment_reconciliations_reconciled_complete_ck
payment_reconciliations_reconciled_compl.value:
"payment_reconciliations"."status" <> 'reconciled' or (
        "payment_reconciliations"."settlement_gross_amount" = "payment_reconciliations"."expected_amount"
        and "payment_reconciliations"."difference_amount" = 0
        and "payment_reconciliations"."net_settlement_amount" is not null
        and "payment_reconciliations"."settlement_date" is not null
        and "payment_reconciliations"."settlement_reference" is not null
        and btrim("payment_reconciliations"."settlement_reference") <> ''
      )

payment_reconciliations_waived_resolutio.name: payment_reconciliations_waived_resolution_ck
payment_reconciliations_waived_resolutio.value:
"payment_reconciliations"."status" <> 'waived' or (
        "payment_reconciliations"."notes" is not null
        and length(btrim("payment_reconciliations"."notes")) >= 8
        and "payment_reconciliations"."resolved_by" is not null
        and "payment_reconciliations"."resolved_at" is not null
      )

payment_refunds_cash_shift_ck.name: payment_refunds_cash_shift_ck
payment_refunds_cash_shift_ck.value:
not ("payment_refunds"."method" = 'cash' and "payment_refunds"."status" = 'confirmed')
        or "payment_refunds"."refund_shift_id" is not null

payments_paid_state_complete_ck.name: payments_paid_state_complete_ck
payments_paid_state_complete_ck.value:
"payments"."status" <> 'paid' or (
        "payments"."verified_by" is not null
        and "payments"."verified_at" is not null
        and "payments"."paid_at" is not null
      )

payments_manual_noncash_verification_ck.name: payments_manual_noncash_verification_ck
payments_manual_noncash_verification_ck.value:
"payments"."method" not in ('qris_manual', 'debit_card', 'credit_card', 'bank_transfer') or (
        btrim("payments"."provider") <> ''
        and lower(btrim("payments"."provider")) <> 'manual'
        and "payments"."provider_reference" is not null
        and btrim("payments"."provider_reference") <> ''
        and "payments"."normalized_reference" is not null
        and length("payments"."normalized_reference") >= 4
        and "payments"."verification_source" in ('merchant_app', 'edc_terminal', 'bank_app', 'bank_statement')
        and "payments"."provider_paid_at" is not null
        and "payments"."settlement_status" <> 'not_applicable'
      )

payments_co_verified_state_ck.name: payments_co_verified_state_ck
payments_co_verified_state_ck.value:
"payments"."verification_status" <> 'co_verified' or (
        "payments"."verification_approval_id" is not null
        and "payments"."co_verified_by" is not null
        and "payments"."co_verified_at" is not null
      )

payments_cash_settlement_ck.name: payments_cash_settlement_ck
payments_cash_settlement_ck.value:
"payments"."method" <> 'cash' or (
        "payments"."settlement_status" = 'not_applicable'
        and "payments"."verification_source" is null
        and "payments"."provider_paid_at" is null
        and "payments"."verification_approval_id" is null
        and "payments"."co_verified_by" is null
        and "payments"."co_verified_at" is null
        and "payments"."evidence_key" is null
      )

pos_checkout_attempts_completed_state_ck.name: pos_checkout_attempts_completed_state_ck
pos_checkout_attempts_completed_state_ck.value: "pos_checkout_attempts"."status" <> 'completed' or ("pos_checkout_attempts"."sale_id" is not null and "pos_checkout_attempts"."completed_at" is not null)

sale_return_cases_completed_state_ck.name: sale_return_cases_completed_state_ck
sale_return_cases_completed_state_ck.value: "sale_return_cases"."status" not in ('completed', 'rejected') or "sale_return_cases"."completed_at" is not null

sale_return_items_received_state_ck.name: sale_return_items_received_state_ck
sale_return_items_received_state_ck.value: "sale_return_items"."status" = 'awaiting_receipt' or ("sale_return_items"."received_by" is not null and "sale_return_items"."received_at" is not null)

sale_return_items_inspected_state_ck.name: sale_return_items_inspected_state_ck
sale_return_items_inspected_state_ck.value:
"sale_return_items"."status" in ('awaiting_receipt', 'pending_inspection') or (
        "sale_return_items"."inspected_by" is not null
        and "sale_return_items"."inspected_at" is not null
        and "sale_return_items"."decided_by" is not null
        and "sale_return_items"."decided_at" is not null
        and "sale_return_items"."decision" is not null
      )

sales_cancelled_timestamp_ck.name: sales_cancelled_timestamp_ck
sales_cancelled_timestamp_ck.value: "sales"."status" not in ('cancelled', 'voided', 'refunded') or "sales"."cancelled_at" is not null

settlement_import_batches_counts_ck.name: settlement_import_batches_counts_ck
settlement_import_batches_counts_ck.value:
"settlement_import_batches"."row_count" >= 0
        and "settlement_import_batches"."valid_row_count" >= 0
        and "settlement_import_batches"."matched_count" >= 0
        and "settlement_import_batches"."applied_count" >= 0
        and "settlement_import_batches"."ambiguous_count" >= 0
        and "settlement_import_batches"."mismatch_count" >= 0
        and "settlement_import_batches"."not_found_count" >= 0
        and "settlement_import_batches"."duplicate_count" >= 0
        and "settlement_import_batches"."ignored_count" >= 0
        and "settlement_import_batches"."failed_count" >= 0

settlement_import_rows_amounts_ck.name: settlement_import_rows_amounts_ck
settlement_import_rows_amounts_ck.value:
("settlement_import_rows"."gross_amount" is null or "settlement_import_rows"."gross_amount" >= 0)
        and "settlement_import_rows"."fee_amount" >= 0
        and "settlement_import_rows"."tax_amount" >= 0
        and ("settlement_import_rows"."net_amount" is null or "settlement_import_rows"."net_amount" >= 0)

settlement_import_rows_applied_ck.name: settlement_import_rows_applied_ck
settlement_import_rows_applied_ck.value:
"settlement_import_rows"."status" <> 'applied' or (
        "settlement_import_rows"."matched_payment_id" is not null
        and "settlement_import_rows"."applied_at" is not null
      )

shifts_closed_state_complete_ck.name: shifts_closed_state_complete_ck
shifts_closed_state_complete_ck.value:
"shifts"."status" <> 'closed' or (
        "shifts"."closed_by" is not null
        and "shifts"."expected_cash" is not null
        and "shifts"."actual_cash" is not null
        and "shifts"."cash_variance" is not null
        and "shifts"."closed_at" is not null
      )

customer_deposit_ledger_direction_ck.name: customer_deposit_ledger_direction_ck
customer_deposit_ledger_direction_ck.value:
(
        ("customer_deposit_ledger"."entry_type" = 'deposit_in' and "customer_deposit_ledger"."direction" = 'credit')
        or ("customer_deposit_ledger"."entry_type" in ('deposit_used', 'deposit_withdrawal') and "customer_deposit_ledger"."direction" = 'debit')
        or ("customer_deposit_ledger"."entry_type" = 'adjustment' and "customer_deposit_ledger"."direction" in ('credit', 'debit'))
      )

customer_deposit_ledger_reference_pair_c.name: customer_deposit_ledger_reference_pair_ck
customer_deposit_ledger_reference_pair_c.value:
("customer_deposit_ledger"."reference_type" is null and "customer_deposit_ledger"."reference_id" is null)
        or ("customer_deposit_ledger"."reference_type" is not null and "customer_deposit_ledger"."reference_id" is not null)
